project_type: Google Colab AI video generation pipeline (Python notebook script)
build_system: None (single-file Colab notebook executed cell-by-cell via IPython/Jupyter)
test_framework: None (no automated tests - manual visual verification in Colab)
build_command: python -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('LTX_PRO.py').read()); print('AST parse OK')"
verification_instructions: 1. Parse the output file with Python AST to confirm syntax validity. 2. Check that all key function definitions exist (generate_pro, generate_extended_video, run_storyboard, run_easy_prompt, etc). 3. Verify integration of EasyPrompt logic by checking for StoryPromptExpander class. 4. Confirm OVERLAP_FRAMES and character consistency mechanisms are present.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - this is a single Python file meant for Google Colab execution
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install packages or access external registries. Must validate via AST parsing only. Cannot run the actual pipeline (requires GPU + ComfyUI). File is ~5600 lines and will grow significantly.
contribution_requirements: Single comprehensive Python file output. Clear inline comments. Google Colab cell markers (@title, @markdown). Compatible with T4 GPU 16GB VRAM.
key_patterns: ComfyUI node wrapper pattern: NODE_CLASS_MAPPINGS[NodeName]() -> node.FUNCTION(**kwargs). VRAM management via cleanup_memory()/aggressive_cleanup(). Dual-pass generation (half-res Pass1 + 2x upscale Pass2). Character consistency via I2V conditioning + anchor latent blend. SVI-Pro segment extension with overlap blending. LLM prompt expansion via LTX2PromptArchitect wrapper. Config via module-level globals with @param Colab annotations.
directory_structure: Flat repository with 5 files: LTX_PRO.py (main pipeline, 5593 lines), LTX2EasyPromptLD.py (LLM prompt architect, 1064 lines), LTX2VisionEasyPromptLD.py (vision model describe, 232 lines), SVI-Pro-Workflow.json (ComfyUI workflow reference), LD-I2V.json (ComfyUI I2V workflow reference)
